title: lathyrus bolanderi var. quercetorum
intro: Lathyrus bolanderi var. quercetorum, also known as the Quercetorum sweet pea, is a perennial legume native to the Pacific coastal regions of North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lathyrus bolanderi var. quercetorum include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and ease congestion, making it a valuable remedy for those suffering from respiratory distress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for easy and accessible use of its medicinal properties.
